name: competitor-price-watch
description: Custom MCP tool: readPrices extracts prices and nearby labels from any pricing page.

tools.name: readPrices
tools.description: Self-contained: navigates to the given pricing page `url`, then extracts prices and the nearest plan/product label. Returns {url, count, prices:[{label, price}]}.

tools.name: finish
tools.description: Call when the task is complete. Pass a short result summary; its value is the final result.
